channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 20th March
item.description:
CWED 700 x 400 x 56mm Road Closure (CW6 Edge Deterioration)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 20th March
item.description:
CWPH 900 x 400 x 51mm Road Closure (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 20th March
item.description:
Damaged loose and rocking kerb Please take up and replace Broken rocking dropped kerb 900x130mm Standard TM Stats required (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped mattress on pavement St George’s Street, 20th March
item.description:
Mattress on pavement outside 14 St George’s Street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Saint George's Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There's is about 4 possible 5 potholes, the whole section of road needs re-surfacing, 20th March
item.description:
Between 113-105 Leckhampton Road,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138a, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: When heavy rain the road floods. Near the bus stop., 20th March
item.description:
When there is heavy rain the raod always floods and can be dangerous. Also as it is near the bus stop it can be difficult to get on/off the bus due to a large amount of water. The problem has been reported before.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Charlton Lane, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged to pavement caused by heavy loads being transported on it, 20th March
item.description:
The Pavement outside 71 Brooklyn Gardens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104, Brooklyn Gardens, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: Overgrown trees and hedges need cutting back, 20th March
item.description:
Overgrown trees and hedges need cutting back
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5,6, Haylea Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The upper part of Leckhamton Road has not been cleaned, 20th March
item.description:
The lower part of Leckhampton Road was cleaned a short while ago together with the pavement (to a degree). The upper part to the Co-op was not. Why was this not carried out at the same time? Also the pavements need cleaning.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 83, Leckhampton Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle, 20th March
item.description:
This vehicle has been abandoned here for some time. It is an eyesore, hazard and deny a resident precious parking space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Golden Vale, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On ramps untaxed no mot, 20th March
item.description:
This vehicle has been sitting here on ramps on highways road for some time. This needs to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Golden Vale, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 20th March
item.description:
Numerouse potholes adjacent to each other outside car park - pointless reporting them individually as even your people should be able to spot them
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Northfield Passage, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin storage structure built on public pavement., 19th March
item.description:
This has been previously reported by another member of the public and marked as resolved but the structure is still there. built on the pavement obstructing the route.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 132, Tennyson Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several pot holes which keep geeting repaired and then have failed a month later .this has happened several times .needs fixing properley .7 pot holes in total ./, 19th March
item.description:
Vicarge lane junction with mill lane brockworth gloucester what three words circle.appointed.whover and sliders.prawn.reclining
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Mill Lane, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous loose manhole cover in the middle of the hare and hounds junction, 19th March
item.description:
In the middle of the hare and hounds junction churchdown, not only is it extremely noisy throughout the day and night as it’s a very busy junction but it’s becoming very dangerous as it clatters about, this has been a problem for months now but nothing has been done
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-4, Cheltenham Road East, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of missing tarmac as cars turn, 19th March
item.description:
Telstar Way turning right to go towards Golden Valley ... in middle of lights as cars need to rurn
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telstar Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bridge height restriction sign misaligned, 19th March
item.description:
The sign is mounted on the railway bridge that passes over Hyde Lane, located on the Bishop's Cleeve side of the bridge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hyde Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Obvious road pothole in south bound carriageway., 19th March
item.description:
Near new house which has been built on west side of A46.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Painswick Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crumbling pavements and potholes both sides of the road., 19th March
item.description:
Just round the corner on welch Rd from village Rd and on the corner on of ismay Rd, joining welch Rd. Struggling to get wheelchair over it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Welch Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 shopping trolleys in the Brook, 19th March
item.description:
In Wymans Brook upside down so unable to identify , nearest property is 46 Limber Hill
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Thomond Close, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
